clearwater_fl.bio: Independent broker serving Tampa Bay families for 14 years. Rachel specializes in term life and mortgage protection, shopping 18+ carriers to find the right rate for every health profile — including tobacco users and those with prior health history.

Lisa helps business owners and professionals in the Tampa Bay area use indexed universal life to build tax-advantaged retirement income. She works closely with CPAs and estate attorneys to structure policies that complement broader financial plans.

David focuses exclusively on final expense and whole life coverage for seniors across Pinellas County. Straightforward planning, no pressure — just honest guidance to help families protect what matters most.

prattville_al.bio: Independent broker specializing in term life and mortgage protection for families. Helps clients navigate impaired-risk underwriting (diabetes, smoker, family history) by shopping multiple carriers to find the best rate class.

Focused on whole life and final expense for seniors and pre-retirees. Holds the LUTCF designation and works extensively with families planning for end-of-life expenses, legacy gifts, and burial coverage.

Veteran-owned agency. Specializes in IUL and whole life for high-net-worth individuals, business owners, and key-person coverage. CLU and ChFC designations. Works closely with estate planning attorneys.
